title: Boom Control
description: Allows you to change explosion power, fire spread and disable dropped item destruction for different explosion types.
body:
# Boom Control Boom Control is a Fabric mod that allows you to change various properties of different explosion types, such as: * Modify explosion power (affects explosion radius and damage) * Change the amount of fire explosions create * Make explosions not destroy dropped items Usage: `/boomcontrol` is the main command, tab completions should lead you to the right place.

##
